Helper plot function for Voom normalisation

plot_voom_normalization.Rd

Helper plot function for Voom normalisation

Usage

plot_voom_normalization(voom_object)

Arguments

voom_object

EList. Voom object with normalised counts.

Value

ggplot object, i.e., voom normalisation plot.
